evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Work across a range of modern data tools following best DataOps practices
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: DataOps best-practice and guidance language dominates with no explicit speed/shipping language present, giving a rigour lean.
evidence.domain_risk: Deliver Mantel's core analytics offerings and provide technical guidance on client projects
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Consulting engagements across varied client projects with no regulatory or financial reporting language specified, placing this at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Work across a range of modern data tools following best DataOps practices
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established consultancy with a named Data & AI department, DataOps practices, and mentoring structure indicates a mature, specialised function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Proficiency in SQL, Python and tools like dbt, Snowflake, Databricks, Redshift, Azure Data Factory, Power BI, Qlik, Looker
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: An extensive, specific tool list and named delivery practices (DataOps) give a concrete picture of the work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Provide clients with guidance and recommendations on the right data tools
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role is explicitly client-facing consulting work centred on client projects and relationships, a commercial orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Lead small teams and work on complex projects independently or collaboratively
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Leading teams and guiding projects independently is strategic, but the framing also includes delivering to client requirements and providing guidance, giving mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Although the department is named "Data & AI," no AI skill or responsibility is expected of the candidate anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data quality, or data contract language appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery, consulting, and capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Create and maintain scalable data pipelines, models, dashboards and reports
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes creating new pipelines/models for client projects with maintaining existing ones across varied consulting engagements.
